response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering and leadership, including roles at Google and Meta, and demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems and real-time applications. However, his background lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure, and regulated AI environments, which are critical for this role. His leadership experience is strong but not explicitly in scaling engineering teams for high-stakes commercial environments.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data processing with experience at Meta and Google
Strong software craftsmanship and leadership, including mentoring and team scaling
Proven ability to design and deploy scalable, event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Direct Mail automation platform)
concerns: No direct experience with agentic AI systems or multi-agent frameworks in production environments
Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains (e.g., credit risk, algorithmic trading, regulatory compliance)
No clear track record of scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or leading hybrid engineering models with external partners
